en: And the thing that got me and why this rant is on my nerves is Trevor Noah mocking the.
ko: 날 짜증나게 하는 게 뭐냐면 Trevor Noah가
ja: イラつくのはトレバー・ノアが
zhTW: 讓我生氣的，也是這個抱怨讓我受不了的，是Trevor Noah嘲笑
vi: Dieu lam toi buc minh va tai sao bai ca than nay lam toi kho chiu la Trevor Noah che nhao

en: Fact that Charlie Kirk, who supported guns, this, you know, what do you, what do you,.
ko: 총을 지지했던 Charlie Kirk가, 이거, 뭐라고, 뭐라고,
ja: 銃を支持したチャーリー・カークが
zhTW: Charlie Kirk支持槍枝的事實，就是，你知道的，你怎麼看，你怎麼看，
vi: viec Charlie Kirk, nguoi ung ho sung, nay, ban biet day, ban nghi sao, ban nghi sao,

en: Second amendment got killed with a gun? Huh? Wasn't that funny? Isn't that ironic?
ko: 수정헌법 2조 지지자가 총에 죽었다고? 하? 웃기지 않아? 아이러니하지 않아?
ja: 修正第2条で銃で殺された？おかしくない？皮肉じゃない？
zhTW: 第二修正案被槍殺了？嗯？那不好笑嗎？那不諷刺嗎？
vi: Tu chinh an thu hai bi ban chet bang sung? Ha? Khong buon cuoi sao? Khong mai mia sao?

ja: 病的じゃない？スチュアート。

en: That my friend seems to be the left today.
ja: 友よ、それが今日の左派のようだ。
zhTW: 朋友，那似乎就是今天的左派。
vi: Ban oi, do co ve la canh ta ngay nay.
